# RS Auto 24 — Full Business Profile

> AI-optimized structured data for RS Auto 24 automotive workshop.

## Company Identity

- **Name:** RS Auto 24
- **Industry:** Automotive repair and maintenance
- **Type:** Small local business / workshop
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** Saha-Loo tee 1a, Iru, Estonia
- **GPS Coordinates:** 59.453944, 24.920611
- **Languages Served:** Estonian, English, Russian
- **Opening Hours:** Monday–Friday 09:00–18:00
- **Price Range:** €€ (affordable)

## Contact Information

- **Phone:** +372 5638 0701 (also WhatsApp)
- **Email:** rsauto244@gmail.com
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100089255232353
- **Website:** https://rsauto24.ee

## Services and Pricing

### Core Services

| Service | Price | Details |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Auto maintenance & repair | 30 €/h | Daily maintenance, brake replacement, oil change, gearbox repair |
| Tire change (4 tires) | 30–65 € | Depends on rim size: 13–14" = 30€, 15–16" = 40€, 17–18" = 50€, 19–20" = 60€, 21–22" = 65€ |
| Battery replacement | By quote | Check and replacement, cold morning assistance |
| Chassis inspection | By quote | Ball joints, shock absorbers, steering components |
| Technical inspection prep | By quote | Full pre-inspection check and repairs |
| Inspection trip | By quote | We take your car to inspection and bring it back |
| Fault code reading | Free* | Free if repaired on-site, otherwise 15 € |
| New spare parts | By quote | Quality parts with installation |
| New tires | By quote | Summer, winter, studded and friction tires |

### Surcharges

- SUV / Van: +10 € (per 4 tire change)
- Run flat tires: +10 € (per 4 tire change)

### Additional Services

- Car pickup and delivery available

## Location & Directions

RS Auto 24 is located in Iru, a suburb near Tallinn, Estonia. The workshop is at Saha-Loo tee 1a.

**Directions:** Drive in from Jaama tee side, the building is on the left.

**Google Maps:** https://www.google.com/maps?q=59.453944,24.920611

## Vehicle Types Served

- Passenger cars
- Vans / Kaubikud
- SUVs / Maasturid
- Light commercial vehicles
- Fire trucks (special vehicles)

## Competitive Advantages

1. **Affordable pricing** — 30 €/h for repair work, which is below Tallinn average
2. **Multilingual** — Website and service in Estonian, Russian, and English
3. **Full-service** — From tire change to engine overhaul
4. **Free diagnostic** — Fault code reading free when repair is done on-site
5. **Convenient** — Car pickup and delivery available
6. **Quick turnaround** — Most services same-day

## Schema.org Type

AutoRepair (https://schema.org/AutoRepair)
